creator: steven@uplinklabs.net
text:
Patrick Lamaiziere was kind enough to point me to the FreeBSD handbook
to figure out how to do proper kernel dumps. So now I've got some more
information after reproducing the panic.

The core.txt.0 contents are below, and it concerns me that 'ps -axl'
and 'fstat' both say "Segmentation fault"...

Anyway. Let me know if there's any more info needed to debug this.

- Steven
